Race #4 of 7 in the 2002 Wisconsin Challenge Series Season

2002 Larry Detjens Memorial
Held on June 27, 2002 at State Park Speedway in Wausau, WI
75 L, 18.75 M, 30.15 KM - Scheduled Distance
